---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a scoped improvement to the GNAP OpenAPI Reference Kit
title: "[feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Description

Describe the proposed feature or improvement.

## Relevant Area

Choose one or more:

- Validator
- `x-gnap` model
- `x-gnap-access` model
- Open Payments examples
- Fixtures
- Arazzo
- Kiota readiness
- Live testnet
- Documentation
- Other

## Expected Behavior

What should happen after this feature is implemented?

## Use Case

Who benefits from this and why?

Examples:

- Open Payments API author
- GNAP/OpenAPI reviewer
- SDK tooling contributor
- Kiota auth-provider designer
- Testnet demo operator

## Scope Notes

Confirm where possible:

- This does not require production funds or production credentials.
- This does not make normal tests depend on network access.
- This does not turn the project into a wallet, payment processor, GNAP server, or HTTP signatures library.

## Additional Context

Links, examples, related issues, or references.
